description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a variety of trees and greenery, set on a rectangular plot of land. The building features a flat roof with multiple levels and visible rooftop elements such as skylights or vents. The exterior walls are predominantly light-colored, likely finished in white or light gray, with some green landscaping at the base. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with several large panes on different sides, and the main entrance is subtly integrated into the facade. The surrounding trees are of mixed species and heights, creating a natural buffer around the structure. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with light-colored walls, large windows, and surrounded by diverse trees on a landscaped plot.
description_view_0: The bungalow is seen from above with the front entrance and a cluster of trees encircling the property, highlighting the flat roof and green landscaping.
description_view_1: This view shows the main facade with prominent windows and the entrance, framed by trees more densely on the right side.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow is visible, with fewer windows and a more private, enclosed appearance, surrounded by trees on all sides.
description_view_3: A side view reveals the building's depth, rooftop features, and a balanced arrangement of trees, with the entrance less visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows on multiple sides
